name: iobroker.ems
description: EMS V2 execution gateway for ioBroker (dryrun/live, audit)

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test build/global_modes/resolve.test.js build/policy/core/hash.test.js build/policy/core/merge.test.js build/policy/core/validate.test.js build/policy/core/registry.test.js build/policy/core/state_write.test.js build/policy/engine.test.js build/intent/wallbox/normalize.test.js build/intent/wallbox/planner.test.js build/intent/wallbox/resolve.test.js build/intent/thermal/resolve.test.js build/intent/thermal/control.test.js build/intent/battery/resolve.test.js build/intent/core/revision.test.js build/intent/core/aggregate.test.js build/intent/sources/iobroker.test.js build/intent/sources/iobroker_domains.test.js build/intent/engine.test.js build/addons/immersion_heater/device_config.test.js build/addons/immersion_heater/validate_config.test.js build/addons/immersion_heater/runtime/fsm.test.js build/addons/immersion_heater/runtime/safety.test.js build/addons/immersion_heater/runtime/feedback.test.js build/learning/history_query.test.js build/learning/pv_bias/math.test.js build/learning/pv_bias/freeze.test.js build/learning/pv_bias/history.test.js build/learning/pv_horizon/math.test.js build/learning/weather/math.test.js build/learning/weather/history.test.js build/learning/price_learning/math.test.js build/learning/price_forecast/math.test.js build/learning/price_forecast/compare.test.js build/learning/house_load/history.test.js build/learning/house_load/math.test.js build/learning/thermal_runtime/math.test.js build/learning/battery_runtime/math.test.js
